mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.news_id = #{newsId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, pet_id, news_id, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{newsId}, #{content})
